TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tang-s-ceng = Hmnuya ni piya Tang-s-ceng ka Tang-s-ceng? Seuxal ga ida thnganan Meng-ku-ceng uri ka Tang-s-ceng ksun ( yasa leexan shruyun kika ini si haya tmhangan da ). Pusu bi o ida hngkwasan mshjil qrijil, wada suqi paru hngkwasan da kika tnegknbkiyan mtucing laqi Tang-s-ceng o ida pkeegu hari uri, saw ka hmrinas 35 na mshjil qrijil. Nasi ini pseanak hnkwasan o tnegknbkiyan tucing laqi Tang-s-ceng ga yabi 1/700~1/800. Tang-s-ceng ga ungac brahan sdakar brah, wana nanaq mshjil do musa pkmuruy sapah spuhan kika pkla. Mtucing laqi Tang-s-ceng ga ida qmita tnegknbkiyan, uxay ka lutuc narux. Kiya ka kiya ni nasi taxa dha o niqan kingal nanaq ka jan-se-ti do, tnegknbkiyan mtucing laqi Tang-s-ceng o ida peegu hari kida. Saw ka nasi mlutuc tucing 2-3 kingal nanaq laqi o, tama ni bubu ga yabi kingal nanaq ka jan-se-ti dha, bukuy na o yabi ptucing Tang-s-ceng na laqi duri. Meenu qtaan ka hniyagan Tang-s-seng hug? Tang-s-ceng na laqi ga yasa ini dungus mdakil ka buuc muhing na, kika mqapi hari qtaan ka muhing, dqras na, msdhiyaq ka dha dowriq, ini kdungus qtaan uxay uri o mquri nganguc qmita ka dowriq, ciway ka bkluy, llabang ka pnglux. Duri ni ruwan quwaq ga suqi ciway ida paru ka hma, leexan bi ini teula qbhangun ka kari. Duri ni teura bi ka ayus qapal baga, llbu ka hniygan, qthur ka hiyi, llabang ka keiyax wawa qaqay, putuh ka tduling baga, pungu buuc o ini hari ksdhug. Mneenu ka narux Tang-s-ceng? Tang-s-ceng laqi ga lxanan bi snegulun thuway mkla, slukah bitaq ska kndkaran knklaan, nkiya naq narux tama baraq dnii klgan. Ida peegu hari ka niqan narux dara uri, duma o leexan niqan buuc, qmbahang birac, biqir dnii klgan uri. Dhuq piya kneudus na ka Tang-s-ceng hug? Kana ka Tang-s-ceng laqi ga tduwa meudus hmrinas 60 ka hngkwasan dha, pusu bi o msealuk dha qnlhangan. Saw ka mneuyas patas, slukah bitaq ska kndkaran knklaan na Tang-s-ceng laqi ga ida tduwa niqan ka mkla qmeepah uri; nasi saw shjil ka kndkaran knklaan, knklaan na o msangay dhuq 5 hngkwasan, muda klaan o ida srahuq paru hari kida endaan. Qtaan patas bnatas Embnatas patas :Lituk Teymu Embatas :Kumu Basaw
S.PHON: = taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč = ńßmnuja ni pija taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ka taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč? s…ôuxal ga ida tńßŇčanan m…ôŇč-ku- ¶…ôŇč u…ĺi ka taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ksun ( jasa l…ô…ôxan sńß…ĺujun kika ini si ńßaja tmńßaŇčan da ). pusu bi o ida ńßŇčkwasan msńß…üil q…ĺi…üil, wada suqi pa…ĺu ńßŇčkwasan da kika tn…ôgknbkijan mtu ¶iŇč laqi taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč o ida pk…ô…ôgu ńßa…ĺi u…ĺi, saw ka ńßm…ĺinas ** na msńß…üil q…ĺi…üil. nasi ini ps…ôanak ńßnkwasan o tn…ôgknbkijan tu ¶iŇč laqi taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ga jabi */***~*/***. taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ga uŇča ¶ b…ĺańßan sdaka…ĺ b…ĺańß, wana nanaq msńß…üil do musa pkmu…ĺuj sapańß spuńßan kika pkla. mtu ¶iŇč laqi taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ga ida qmita tn…ôgknbkijan, uxaj ka lutu ¶ na…ĺux. kija ka kija ni nasi taxa dńßa o niqan kiŇčal nanaq ka …üan-s…ô-ti do, tn…ôgknbkijan mtu ¶iŇč laqi taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč o ida p…ô…ôgu ńßa…ĺi kida. saw ka nasi mlutu ¶ tu ¶iŇč *-* kiŇčal nanaq laqi o, tama ni bubu ga jabi kiŇčal nanaq ka …üan-s…ô-ti dńßa, bukuj na o jabi ptu ¶iŇč taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč na laqi du…ĺi. m…ô…ônu qtaan ka ńßnijagan taŇč-s-s…ôŇč ńßug? taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč na laqi ga jasa ini duŇčus mdakil ka buu ¶ muńßiŇč na, kika mqapi ńßa…ĺi qtaan ka muńßiŇč, dq…ĺas na, msdńßijaq ka dńßa dow…ĺiq, ini kduŇčus qtaan uxaj u…ĺi o mqu…ĺi ŇčaŇču ¶ qmita ka dow…ĺiq, ¶iwaj ka bkluj, llabaŇč ka pŇčlux. du…ĺi ni …ĺuwan quwaq ga suqi ¶iwaj ida pa…ĺu ka ńßma, l…ô…ôxan bi ini t…ôula qbńßaŇčun ka ka…ĺi. du…ĺi ni t…ôu…ĺa bi ka ajus qapal baga, llbu ka ńßnijgan, qtńßu…ĺ ka ńßiji, llabaŇč ka k…ôijax wawa qaqaj, putuńß ka tduliŇč baga, puŇču buu ¶ o ini ńßa…ĺi ksdńßug. mn…ô…ônu ka na…ĺux taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč? taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč laqi ga lxanan bi sn…ôgulun tńßuwaj mkla, slukańß bitaq ska kndka…ĺan knklaan, nkija naq na…ĺux tama ba…ĺaq dnii klgan. ida p…ô…ôgu ńßa…ĺi ka niqan na…ĺux da…ĺa u…ĺi, duma o l…ô…ôxan niqan buu ¶, qmbańßaŇč bi…ĺa ¶, biqi…ĺ dnii klgan u…ĺi. dńßuq pija kn…ôudus na ka taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ńßug? kana ka taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč laqi ga tduwa m…ôudus ńßm…ĺinas ** ka ńßŇčkwasan dńßa, pusu bi o ms…ôaluk dńßa qnlńßaŇčan. saw ka mn…ôujas patas, slukańß bitaq ska kndka…ĺan knklaan na taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč laqi ga ida tduwa niqan ka mkla qm…ô…ôpańß u…ĺi; nasi saw sńß…üil ka kndka…ĺan knklaan, knklaan na o msaŇčaj dńßuq * ńßŇčkwasan, muda klaan o ida s…ĺańßuq pa…ĺu ńßa…ĺi kida …ôndaan. qtaan patas bnatas …ômbnatas patas :lituk t…ômu …ômbatas :kumu basaw
S.FORM: = Tang-s-ceng = Hmnuya ni piya Tang-s-ceng ka Tang-s-ceng? Seuxal ga ida thnganan Meng-ku-ceng uri ka Tang-s-ceng ksun ( yasa leexan shruyun kika ini si haya tmhangan da ). Pusu bi o ida hngkwasan mshjil qrijil, wada suqi paru hngkwasan da kika tnegknbkiyan mtucing laqi Tang-s-ceng o ida pkeegu hari uri, saw ka hmrinas 35 na mshjil qrijil. Nasi ini pseanak hnkwasan o tnegknbkiyan tucing laqi Tang-s-ceng ga yabi 1/700~1/800. Tang-s-ceng ga ungac brahan sdakar brah, wana nanaq mshjil do musa pkmuruy sapah spuhan kika pkla. Mtucing laqi Tang-s-ceng ga ida qmita tnegknbkiyan, uxay ka lutuc narux. Kiya ka kiya ni nasi taxa dha o niqan kingal nanaq ka jan-se-ti do, tnegknbkiyan mtucing laqi Tang-s-ceng o ida peegu hari kida. Saw ka nasi mlutuc tucing 2-3 kingal nanaq laqi o, tama ni bubu ga yabi kingal nanaq ka jan-se-ti dha, bukuy na o yabi ptucing Tang-s-ceng na laqi duri. Meenu qtaan ka hniyagan Tang-s-seng hug? Tang-s-ceng na laqi ga yasa ini dungus mdakil ka buuc muhing na, kika mqapi hari qtaan ka muhing, dqras na, msdhiyaq ka dha dowriq, ini kdungus qtaan uxay uri o mquri nganguc qmita ka dowriq, ciway ka bkluy, llabang ka pnglux. Duri ni ruwan quwaq ga suqi ciway ida paru ka hma, leexan bi ini teula qbhangun ka kari. Duri ni teura bi ka ayus qapal baga, llbu ka hniygan, qthur ka hiyi, llabang ka keiyax wawa qaqay, putuh ka tduling baga, pungu buuc o ini hari ksdhug. Mneenu ka narux Tang-s-ceng? Tang-s-ceng laqi ga lxanan bi snegulun thuway mkla, slukah bitaq ska kndkaran knklaan, nkiya naq narux tama baraq dnii klgan. Ida peegu hari ka niqan narux dara uri, duma o leexan niqan buuc, qmbahang birac, biqir dnii klgan uri. Dhuq piya kneudus na ka Tang-s-ceng hug? Kana ka Tang-s-ceng laqi ga tduwa meudus hmrinas 60 ka hngkwasan dha, pusu bi o msealuk dha qnlhangan. Saw ka mneuyas patas, slukah bitaq ska kndkaran knklaan na Tang-s-ceng laqi ga ida tduwa niqan ka mkla qmeepah uri; nasi saw shjil ka kndkaran knklaan, knklaan na o msangay dhuq 5 hngkwasan, muda klaan o ida srahuq paru hari kida endaan. Qtaan patas bnatas Embnatas patas :Lituk Teymu Embatas :Kumu Basaw
S.PHON: = taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč = ńßmnuja ni pija taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ka taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč? s…ôuxal ga ida tńßŇčanan m…ôŇč-ku- ¶…ôŇč u…ĺi ka taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ksun ( jasa l…ô…ôxan sńß…ĺujun kika ini si ńßaja tmńßaŇčan da ). pusu bi o ida ńßŇčkwasan msńß…üil q…ĺi…üil, wada suqi pa…ĺu ńßŇčkwasan da kika tn…ôgknbkijan mtu ¶iŇč laqi taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč o ida pk…ô…ôgu ńßa…ĺi u…ĺi, saw ka ńßm…ĺinas ** na msńß…üil q…ĺi…üil. nasi ini ps…ôanak ńßnkwasan o tn…ôgknbkijan tu ¶iŇč laqi taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ga jabi */***~*/***. taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ga uŇča ¶ b…ĺańßan sdaka…ĺ b…ĺańß, wana nanaq msńß…üil do musa pkmu…ĺuj sapańß spuńßan kika pkla. mtu ¶iŇč laqi taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ga ida qmita tn…ôgknbkijan, uxaj ka lutu ¶ na…ĺux. kija ka kija ni nasi taxa dńßa o niqan kiŇčal nanaq ka …üan-s…ô-ti do, tn…ôgknbkijan mtu ¶iŇč laqi taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč o ida p…ô…ôgu ńßa…ĺi kida. saw ka nasi mlutu ¶ tu ¶iŇč *-* kiŇčal nanaq laqi o, tama ni bubu ga jabi kiŇčal nanaq ka …üan-s…ô-ti dńßa, bukuj na o jabi ptu ¶iŇč taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč na laqi du…ĺi. m…ô…ônu qtaan ka ńßnijagan taŇč-s-s…ôŇč ńßug? taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč na laqi ga jasa ini duŇčus mdakil ka buu ¶ muńßiŇč na, kika mqapi ńßa…ĺi qtaan ka muńßiŇč, dq…ĺas na, msdńßijaq ka dńßa dow…ĺiq, ini kduŇčus qtaan uxaj u…ĺi o mqu…ĺi ŇčaŇču ¶ qmita ka dow…ĺiq, ¶iwaj ka bkluj, llabaŇč ka pŇčlux. du…ĺi ni …ĺuwan quwaq ga suqi ¶iwaj ida pa…ĺu ka ńßma, l…ô…ôxan bi ini t…ôula qbńßaŇčun ka ka…ĺi. du…ĺi ni t…ôu…ĺa bi ka ajus qapal baga, llbu ka ńßnijgan, qtńßu…ĺ ka ńßiji, llabaŇč ka k…ôijax wawa qaqaj, putuńß ka tduliŇč baga, puŇču buu ¶ o ini ńßa…ĺi ksdńßug. mn…ô…ônu ka na…ĺux taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč? taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč laqi ga lxanan bi sn…ôgulun tńßuwaj mkla, slukańß bitaq ska kndka…ĺan knklaan, nkija naq na…ĺux tama ba…ĺaq dnii klgan. ida p…ô…ôgu ńßa…ĺi ka niqan na…ĺux da…ĺa u…ĺi, duma o l…ô…ôxan niqan buu ¶, qmbańßaŇč bi…ĺa ¶, biqi…ĺ dnii klgan u…ĺi. dńßuq pija kn…ôudus na ka taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč ńßug? kana ka taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč laqi ga tduwa m…ôudus ńßm…ĺinas ** ka ńßŇčkwasan dńßa, pusu bi o ms…ôaluk dńßa qnlńßaŇčan. saw ka mn…ôujas patas, slukańß bitaq ska kndka…ĺan knklaan na taŇč-s- ¶…ôŇč laqi ga ida tduwa niqan ka mkla qm…ô…ôpańß u…ĺi; nasi saw sńß…üil ka kndka…ĺan knklaan, knklaan na o msaŇčaj dńßuq * ńßŇčkwasan, muda klaan o ida s…ĺańßuq pa…ĺu ńßa…ĺi kida …ôndaan. qtaan patas bnatas …ômbnatas patas :lituk t…ômu …ômbatas :kumu basaw
